title: Naoto Nakatani’s CV
text:
nak24019@byui.edu | IinkedIn



Spring 2025 Disease Spread Simulation (Python Project) - Developed an interactive disease spread simulator using Python and Tkinter. - Implemented probabilistic infection, recovery, and mortality models. - Applied OOP principles to manage simulation states and graphical rendering. - Tracked and visualized metrics such as steps, peak infection, and recoveries.



Apr 2025 - now     Brigham Young University - Idaho, Idaho



Apr 2024 – Nov 2024 Mikuni International College – Computer Science Teaching Assistant - Assisted in teaching CS classes and grading assignments and exams. - Provided one-on-one student support to improve coursework understanding. - Collaborated with instructors to enhance teaching quality. - Served as a student leader coordinating meetings with faculty and volunteers.
Mar 2022 – Apr 2024 Community Volunteer Representative — Fukuoka, Japan - Dedicated 70+ hours/week to community outreach and service projects. - Trained and mentored 10+ team members in communication and leadership. - Organized weekly meetings and coordinated with local organizations.

Computer Skills: MS Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Python

Languages: Fluent in Japanese; basic Chinese

Work Eligibility: Eligible to work in the U.S.; will require visa sponsorship for full-time employment
